subject: English
questionText:
“Griffin is a brilliant scientist but not a wise human being.”
Justify this statement with reference to the story.
answerText: Griffin was a brilliant scientist because he discovered how to become invisible. However, he misused his intelligence for selfish purposes. He set his landlord’s house on fire and stole money and clothes. Instead of helping society, he created trouble for others. This shows that he was not wise as he used his knowledge wrongly.
